message:
fix: query-do explain() used per-column canSkipPage and stale projections

explain() had two issues:
1. Used canSkipPage per-column instead of canSkipPageMultiCol — caused
   inconsistent page skip counts vs actual query and missed filterGroups
2. Used projections-only column set, not neededNames — produced
   inaccurate byte/read estimates when filters referenced non-projected columns

Also removes unused canSkipPage import.
